'''鈭歵h-s-f-g''' ('''kathasfegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lifeboat|lifeboat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lifeboat|lifeboat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-f-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathasfegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithasfegoko|thithasfegoko]] || [[word:jithasfegoko|jithasfegoko]] || [[word:shithasfegoko|shithasfegoko]] || [[word:kithasfegoko|kithasfegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthasfegoko|thuthuthasfegoko]] || [[word:jujuthasfegoko|jujuthasfegoko]] || [[word:shushuthasfegoko|shushuthasfegoko]] || [[word:kukuthasfegoko|kukuthasfegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothasfegoko|thothasfegoko]] || [[word:jothasfegoko|jothasfegoko]] || [[word:shothasfegoko|shothasfegoko]] || [[word:kothasfegoko|kothasfegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothasfegoko|thothasfegoko]] || [[word:jothasfegoko|jothasfegoko]] || [[word:shothasfegoko|shothasfegoko]] || [[word:kothasfegoko|kothasfegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thasfegoko|th忙thasfegoko]] || [[word:j忙thasfegoko|j忙thasfegoko]] || [[word:sh忙thasfegoko|sh忙thasfegoko]] || [[word:k忙thasfegoko|k忙thasfegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathasfegoko|thathasfegoko]] || [[word:jathasfegoko|jathasfegoko]] || [[word:shathasfegoko|shathasfegoko]] || [[word:kathasfegoko|kathasfegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathasfegoko|thathasfegoko]] || [[word:jathasfegoko|jathasfegoko]] || [[word:shathasfegoko|shathasfegoko]] || [[word:kathasfegoko|kathasfegoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
